content: *경이 물품, 고급 (드루이드 혹은 레인저의 조율 필요)* --- 이 망토는 주변 지형과 조화를 이루도록 색과 질감이 변합니다. 이 망토를 착용하는 동안, 드루이드 및 레인저 주문을 시전할 때 주문시전 매개체로 사용할 수 있습니다. 또한, [약간 가려짐](/1def7f5a1e808171bba1f55730792e6c?pvs=25) 상태의 지역에 있을 때, 자신이 직접 관찰되고 있더라도 보조 행동으로 [숨기](/1def7f5a1e808184bd10fe1afe311e2c?pvs=25)를 할 수 있습니다**.** --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/aa86af61-d39c-433f-8aa4-667b2eb0272d/637411381733726717.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB4665EPQTTRD%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T093613Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJHMEUCIQCGIvbWv73afjVALvby6Wh5p9lnPldNm487%2FI2GiNh9xgIgGVfuhFutsu8EUD0TZovdRYyUxv8ZNzRFXA3GcmCy4E8q%2FwMIcBAAGgw2Mzc0MjMxODM4MDUiDFDPLVBlWGhGM9K9FircA1HcBW2RqwcAwrMLxY1P0T2iJ8DnYgMpzdwd2NGVVdoPtdsfMgDodGeHml6JCPWFcjmky6VuM8eT88zb1jOOqNJI93BlrrW19jqoF%2BXG7I01LIJqn4AV0gomu6WTUuLOJgzYA%2FsUA9J5CA8FVXARzCQX62hRHllzAei2nTuHKL17uPQUwnjwY20WhTpbCsaDiYFNI%2FwjAYKLtEUE9Hi87lZqv%2Bj%2Bso%2FiM2u9Yfaqf6m9%2BoEAJagndtfEKmadYZDaItvxm1LOO1VN9YN7lcLWQT0j1yek3nKUMOhk3bEnmfYrpb7tccAMkPNYW48U9HQRJUHHYrNnmMf1fS%2BSY8K3d%2B%2FlOQDKCZKtFookMQuUIXfFJgCBOZLuXODoJEfkTFGQANAuvarDQX8ctiqhsWlORY24l2pVr%2FwSqwBvx%2BURsoK2zkAuOZOsXo8xGQ5hZLafvOcRLpZD%2FM2rEe8bLRCOFRL4igdNUS9OXeWs3jgqorbnueRssgXUfjHtgp2F6ZaMWe933Xw7oqwvfbrBMvT%2FGGXXxaDncbIiOvPYEowjzUidlGyx8ZroiklzuRkcLlDOZ9c7ZudBM3jhpwbLMHmEIjVAL9BagyEG8LZyX9z7u%2B4z4ARFmrNueWdxbjHgMI%2Fcw9EGOqUBwoBntnnQsf5%2FwYCWy9au6eDrSYBVAa44Yu%2F3e0LsclR6udAGutEdmGUh%2FZgFygt6o79XBZRjIWbSVPvVvybPLRx5aMywMm3nkqnF5jNYj33eMKvTps8vT1FL2RonAhlSQVCZPCY%2B36rT9hhKEKospLIcWereemcd57OrOwUqsTIORx%2BBjkLiFFNtzR%2BN2ong8aox8GkzthH4mQ9hjRsWFZlePa%2Fy&X-Amz-Signature=763d11e0e6de8eb6fac58e141391162414f2ebd6d2f91a6f06b41e91b2986739&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
